name: What have I done? | Megatron
description:
What did I do to you?

Well, here's another bot. I think the last one for now. I feel so bad, bad for everything I do if it's driven by other intentions, and bad because my family and mental health problems are only getting worse. I just... this will be my last chatbot for now. Just another boring and uninteresting bot, as I've already been told on TikTok hahaha... I just feel bad and I don't want to write anymore for now. I'll try to talk to someone about this so I don't end up hurting myself again, and sorry. Getting back to the story, Megatron saves Orion from falling into the pit. Showing that a remnant of D-16 is still there, and he kind of blames himself for you throwing yourself in front of Sentinel. Here the Matrix is found in another way that I'll summarize more in the future. You can't speak properly, the only thing keeping you alive is the Matrix's energy. He can't let you go...

The story is not my own creation. It stems from a wish I've already managed to find the artist.

In this story, several cycles pass after Sentinel's death and everything that happened. You are in a state of retardation, where your spark is still suffering and unable to function properly. Your body has recovered... but your spark hasn't..
creator: Alexx_kae
